title: Moondance
why_this_song: Moondance by Van Morrison (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You know I'm tryin' to please to the calling"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Well, it's a marvelous night for a moondance"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Well, it's a marvelous night for a moondance"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "A fantabulous night to make romance"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Of your heartstrings that play soft and low"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: A fantabulous night to make romance
And all the leaves on the trees are falling
To the sound of the breezes that blow
La, la, la, la, la, in the moonlight
Can't I just have one more, more dance with you, my love?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, it's a marvelous night for a moondance
I can't wait 'til the mornin' has come
To the sound of the breezes that blow

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Moondance" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Moondance"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Van Morrison one question about "Moondance", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Van Morrison sobre "Moondance", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Moondance" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Moondance" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
